name: Retreating Trimshot
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Retreating Trimshot Rune Attack. Execute a swift backward somersault while loosing three arrows in rapid succession, maintaining pressure even as you evade danger.

name: Skyfall Shot
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Skyfall Shot Rune Attack. Leap high into the air and drive an arrow straight down, unleashing a violent shockwave on impact that ripples outward from the point of impact.

name: Crosscut
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Crosscut Rune Attack. Spin through your target with a sweeping strike, reverse the motion for a second cut, then somersault back and fire a parting arrow.

name: Flipkick Burst
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Flipkick Burst Rune Attack. Launch an upward kick to propel yourself into a tight backflip, loosing three rapid arrows mid-rotation to strike your foe as you slip out of reach.

name: Glideburst
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Glideburst Rune Attack. Glide forward in a low, controlled slide, loosing three rapid arrows mid-motion to pressure and punish foes in your path.

name: Multi Shot
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Multi Shot Rune Attack. Unleash a rapid volley of arrows, striking several foes in a single, breath-taking display of archery prowess.

name: Arrowstorm
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Arrowstorm Rune Attack. Fire a lone arrow skyward, calling down a punishing rain of arrows that showers the battlefield and overwhelms foes caught beneath it.

name: Evasive Shot
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Evasive Shot Rune Attack. Leap back with agile grace, notching and loosing an arrow in one fluid motion to create distance and deal damage simultaneously.

name: Skyburst Volley
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Skyburst Volley Rune Attack. Leap into the air and loose five arrows in a brilliant bursting spread, raining destruction across all caught beneath your descent.

name: Knockout Shot
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Knockout Shot Rune Attack. A forceful arrow designed to strike with such impact that it can topple foes, leaving them vulnerable on the ground.

name: Cone Shot
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Cone Shot Rune Attack. Unleash a concentrated burst of arrows in a narrow cone, overwhelming a single target or any in close proximity with a powerful volley.

name: Breakstep
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Breakstep Rune Attack. Drive a sharp kick into your foe, then follow through with three rapid arrows before they can recover.

name: Skybreaker
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Skybreaker Rune Attack. Leap skyward and drive an arrow straight down, calling a crackling bolt of lightning to erupt on impact and jolt multiple foes at once.

name: Firefall
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Firefall Rune Attack. Leap upward and plunge an arrow into the earth, erupting a roaring blast of flame that engulfs all caught nearby.

name: Plague Arrow
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Plague Arrow Rune Attack. Coat your arrow in virulent toxins, causing disease and decay upon impact.

name: Ice Arrow
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Ice Arrow Rune Attack. Enchant your arrow with frost, striking your target with a shard that chills to the core.

name: Fire Arrow
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Fire Arrow Rune Attack. Ignite your bowstring, transforming your next shot into a blazing arrow to scorch your targets.

name: Lightning Arrow
description: Slot this Rune into a Bow to gain the Lightning Arrow Rune Attack. Charge your arrow with crackling energy, releasing a bolt that seeks your enemy's weaknesses.

name: Slashing Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Slashing Spin Rune Attack. Charge and unleash a devastating swinging blow.

name: Relentless Cleave
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Relentless Cleave Rune Attack. Unleash three brutal swings in rapid succession, then smash your weapon into the ground with overwhelming force to trigger a fiery explosion that devastates nearby enemies.

name: Double Crush
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Double Crush Rune Attack. Bounce forward and land two powerful consecutive strikes.

name: Berserk Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Berserk Flurry Rune Attack. Channel the fury of a berserker and surge forward, unleashing four rapid, powerful swings to overwhelm your foes.

name: Kick Slash
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Kick Slash Rune Attack. Combine a spinning leg kick with a slashing strike at the end, stunning enemies before delivering a damaging blow.

name: Frenzied Cleave
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Frenzied Cleave Rune Attack. Unleash three rapid, savage swings in quick succession, overwhelming enemies with wild, relentless force.

name: Dodge Slamdown
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Dodge Slamdown Rune Attack. Bounce forward and land a powerful strike from above.

name: Raging Spiral
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Raging Spiral Rune Attack. Spin forward three times with unstoppable momentum, swinging your weapon in wide arcs to shred all enemies in your path.

name: Crushing Slam
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Crushing Slam Rune Attack. Leap forward and bring your weapon down with monumental force, slamming into the ground to crush enemies beneath its impact.

name: Wallbreaker
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Wallbreaker Rune Attack. Pierce through enemy barriers and defenses with a powerful stab, shattering obstacles in your path.

name: Tremor Slam
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Tremor Slam Rune Attack. Smash your weapon into the ground with unstoppable force, unleashing a shockwave that shakes the earth and staggers nearby enemies.

name: Ground Slam
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Ground Slam Rune Attack. Perform a horizontal sweeping blow and finish the combo with an aerial downward slam.

name: Spiral Crash
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Spiral Crash Rune Attack. Step forward and spin with crushing momentum, then deliver a devastating blow that knocks nearby enemies to the ground.

name: Juggle Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Juggle Strike Rune Attack. Charge and unleash a devastating swinging uppercut.

name: Crushing Triple
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Crushing Triple Rune Attack. Launch into a powerful three-hit combo, each swing heavier and more forceful than the last, to overpower enemies with crushing force.

name: Limit Break
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Limit Break Rune Attack. Charge and unleash a 4-hit combo of consecutive slashing strikes with a final overwhelming blow.

name: Rip and Tear
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Rip and Tear Rune Attack. Slash forward with brutal force, aiming to inflict massive damage and tear through anything standing in your path.

name: Multi Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Multi Spin Rune Attack. Spin slowly six times in a whirlwind powerful attack, striking all nearby enemies with continuous blows.

name: Pole Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Pole Flurry Rune Attack. Perform two vertical sweeping blows and finish the combo with a downward slam.

name: Reap
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Reap Rune Attack. Land two spinning blows on your foe and finish him with a slam strike.

name: Crushing Quad
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Crushing Quad Rune Attack. Unleash a wild barrage of swings with your weapon, executing a rapid four-hit combo that devastates foes with each successive strike.

name: Balance Smash
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Balance Smash Rune Attack. Balance atop your weapon as you roll over it, then seize it firmly to deliver a ground-shattering smash.

name: Berserk Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Berserk Strike Rune Attack. Thump your chest to fuel your rage, then deliver a devastating strike that crushes the enemy with brutal force.

name: Spin Crush
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Spin Crush Rune Attack. Perform a horizontal sweeping blow and finish the combo with a downward strike.

name: Whirlwind
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Whirlwind Rune Attack. Spin rapidly in a whirlwind attack, striking all nearby enemies with continuous blows.

name: Berserk Slam
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Berserk Slam Rune Attack. Bellow a battle cry and step forward to slam your weapon into the ground, unleashing a devastating impact that rattles nearby foes.

name: Cyclone Swipe
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Cyclone Swipe Rune Attack. Swipe your weapon in a circular motion to deal great damage to surrounding enemies.

name: Knockdown Swirl
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Knockdown Swirl Rune Attack. Gracefully spin your weapon in a devastating whirlwind, smashing and knocking your enemies down with strength, skill and a series of blows.

name: Crushing Uppercut
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Crushing Uppercut Rune Attack. Twirl into a spin that gathers momentum and then unleash a devastating uppercut swing, propelling enemies upward with crushing force.

name: Breaker Thrust
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Breaker Thrust Rune Attack. Lunge forward with overwhelming force, thrusting your weapon into enemies to knock them off their feet.

name: Seismic Crush
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Seismic Crush Rune Attack. Smash your weapon into the ground with unstoppable force, unleashing a massive shockwave that knocks down all nearby enemies.

name: Pestilent Recoil
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Pestilent Recoil Rune Attack. Strike with two corrupted melee blows, then leap back and unleash a toxic wave of plague energy toward your enemy.

name: Plague Crush
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Plague Crush Rune Attack. Infuse your weapon with virulent toxins and unleash a sweeping strike, causing disease and decay upon impact.

name: Lightning Assault
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Assault Rune Attack. Infuse your weapon with lightning and instantly approach a foe with a sweeping strike, electrifying and making vulnerable.

name: Ice Ram
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Ice Ram Rune Attack. Infuse your weapon with frost and unleash a sweeping strike, freezing and slowing enemies down.

name: Fire Whirlwind
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Whirlwind Rune Attack. Spin in a prolonged fiery whirlwind, engulfing enemies with flames and leaving them burned.

name: Fire Swipe
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Swipe Rune Attack. Infuse your weapon with flames and unleash a sweeping strike, engulfing enemies in flames.

name: Eruption
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Eruption Rune Attack. Jump and land with a ground-shaking slam to trigger volcanic eruption, damaging all surrounding enemies in a large radius around you.

name: Fire Slam
description: Slot this Rune into a Two-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Slam Rune Attack. Jump and land with a devastating slam to set the area on fire, damaging all surrounding enemies in a small radius around you.

name: Plague Nova
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Plague Nova Rune Attack. Unleash a burst of plague energy around you, infecting all nearby enemies. Charge it to expand the area of effect and increase its attack power.

name: Plague Wave
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Plague Wave Rune Attack. Launch a wave of virulent curses to plague multiple enemies. Charge it to amplify their damage.

name: Rotwheel
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Rotwheel Rune Attack. Summon a massive, rolling mass of plague that barrels forward, infecting and corrupting all enemies in its path.

name: Plague Breath
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Plague Breath Rune Attack. Cast a virulent plague ball that infects enemies on impact. Charge it to increase its toxic power and deal more damage.

name: Plague Sweep
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Plague Sweep Rune Attack. Perform a 360-degree sweep with your staff, laced with toxins, breaking enemy guards and poisoning them.

name: Pestilence
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Pestilence Rune Attack. Target an area, leap into the air, and slam down to create a toxic eruption that damages and poisons all enemies within a large radius.

name: Shock Nova
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Shock Nova Rune Attack. Unleash a burst of electric energy around you, shocking all nearby enemies. Charge it to expand the area of effect and increase its attack power.

name: Spark
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Spark Rune Attack. Launch a wave of lightning bolts to shock multiple foes. Charge it to amplify their damage.

name: Lightning Sweep
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Lightning Sweep Rune Attack. Perform a 360-degree sweep with your staff, charged with electricity, breaking enemy guards and shocking them.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Chain Lightning Rune Attack. Unleash a lightning bolt that strikes your target and, when charged, arcs to hit additional nearby enemies, electrifying the battlefield.

name: Thunderstrike
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Thunderstrike Rune Attack. Target an area, leap into the air, and slam down to create a thunderous eruption that damages and stuns all enemies within a large radius.

name: Homing Frost
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Homing Frost Rune Attack. Summon a ring of icy darts around you. Upon release, the shards home in on your current target, striking them with freezing force.

name: Frost Nova
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Frost Nova Rune Attack. Unleash a burst of icy energy around you, freezing all nearby enemies. Charge it to expand the area of effect and increase its attack power.

name: Hail
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Hail Rune Attack. Launch a wave of icebolts to freeze multiple foes. Charge it to amplify their damage.

name: Icebolt
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Icebolt Rune Attack. Cast a chilling iceball that freezes enemies on impact. Charge it to increase its freezing power and deal more damage.

name: Ice Sweep
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Ice Sweep Rune Attack. Perform a 360-degree sweep with your staff, encased in ice, breaking enemy guards and freezing them solid.

name: Frost Stream
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Frost Stream Rune Attack. Unleash a frost stream, chilling all foes in its path. Active until releasing the Rune button.

name: Glacial Spike
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Glacial Spike Rune Attack. Target an area, leap into the air, and slam down to create a frosty eruption that damages and freezes all enemies within a large radius.

name: Fire Nova
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Fire Nova Rune Attack. Unleash a fiery explosion around you, damaging all nearby enemies. Charge it to expand the area of effect and increase its attack power.

name: Fire Wave
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Fire Wave Rune Attack. Launch a wave of fireballs to blaze multiple foes. Charge it to amplify their damage.

name: Fireball
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Fireball Rune Attack. Cast a blazing fireball that incinerates enemies on impact. Charge it to increase its fiery power and deal more damage.

name: Inferno
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Inferno Rune Attack. Fire a continuous beam of fire, igniting all foes in its path. Active until releasing the Rune button.

name: Flame Sweep
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Flame Sweep Rune Attack. Perform a 360-degree flaming sweep with your staff to break enemy guards and set them ablaze.

name: Hellfire
description: Slot this Rune into a Staff or a Wand to gain the Hellfire Rune Attack. Target an area, leap into the air, and slam down to create a fiery eruption that damages all enemies within a large radius.

name: Plague Explosion
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Explosion Rune Attack. Detonate festering buboes that poison and corrode everything caught in their vile radius.

name: Plague Burst
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Burst Rune Attack. Fire four charged plague projectiles that erupt on contact, spreading infection.

name: Plague Column
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Column Rune Attack. Conjure a vertical torrent of plague energy that spits infectious projectiles outward.

name: Plague Barrage
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Barrage Rune Attack. Charge forward and unleash a flurry of plague-ridden projectiles at nearby enemies.

name: Plague Launch
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Launch Rune Attack. Leap backward and slam down with a shockwave of plague, infecting all enemies on landing.

name: Plague Dart
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Dart Rune Attack. Launch a diseased dart that infects your target with a slow-acting poison.

name: Plague Smite
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Smite Rune Attack. Inflict disease beneath your foes, bursting pestilence from underfoot.

name: Plague Splatter
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Plague Splatter Rune Attack. Summon a massive plague bubble and hurl it at your enemies, bursting on impact in a pool of corruption.

name: Lightning Flash
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Flash Rune Attack. Fire concentrated lightning bolts forward, stunning enemies struck by their impact.

name: Lightning Storm
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Storm Rune Attack. Summon multiple bolts of lightning that cascade forward in quick succession, striking anything in their path.

name: Static
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Static Rune Attack. Charge your body with static energy, electrocuting enemies who come too close.

name: Lightning Leap
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Leap Rune Attack. Leap high into the air, then plunge downward in a surge of lightning that shocks all enemies below.

name: Lightning Barrage
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Barrage Rune Attack. Dash into your enemies and deliver a rapid series of electrified strikes.

name: Charged Bolt
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Charged Bolt Rune Attack. Release bolts of lightning in all directions, shocking nearby enemies with surging energy.

name: Lightning Dart
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Dart Rune Attack. Hurl a crackling dart of lightning toward your target, jolting them on impact.

name: Lightning Blast
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Blast Rune Attack. Electrify the ground beneath your enemies, shocking them with a surge of unstable energy.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Lightning Bolt Rune Attack. Call down a massive bolt of lightning from the sky, striking your target with thunderous force.

name: Frost Needles
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Frost Needles Rune Attack. Unleash a fan of sharp ice shards that pierce and slow your enemies.

name: Frigid Arc
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Frigid Arc Rune Attack. Leap into the air and release a sweeping arc of frost energy, freezing enemies caught in its icy beam from above.

name: Cold Sling
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Cold Sling Rune Attack. Leap into the air and hurl three icy projectiles in rapid succession toward your target.

name: Frost Step
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Frost Step Rune Attack. Dodge out of harm’s way, then counter with a chilling stream of frost that freezes enemies in your path.

name: Ice Dart
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Ice Dart Rune Attack. Fire a chilling dart of ice at your enemy, briefly slowing them with frostbite.

name: Fire Burst
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Fire Burst Rune Attack. Release a fiery burst that lingers briefly before exploding in a powerful blast of flame.

name: Fire Wall
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Fire Wall Rune Attack. Erect a blazing wall of fire in front of you. Enemies that pass through suffer continuous burning damage.

name: Spin Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Spin Strike Rune Attack. Spin into a fiery whirlwind, lashing out in all directions and scorching surrounding enemies.

name: Converging Flame
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Converging Flame Rune Attack. Summon six fireballs that hover before you. Charge to increase their damage, then release to fire them forward in a curving path that converges after a distance, striking enemies with focused burning power.

name: Fire Dart
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Fire Dart Rune Attack. Hurl a searing dart of flame toward your enemy, igniting them with a focused burst of fire.

name: Fire Blast
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Fire Blast Rune Attack. Summon a small explosion of fire in front of you, scorching enemies with intense heat.

name: Fire Walk
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Fire Walk Rune Attack. Engulf yourself in flames, then leave a trail of fire behind that burns all who follow.

name: Armageddon
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Armageddon Rune Attack. Call down a devastating inferno in front of you, engulfing the area in a massive explosion of fire.

name: Armageddon
description: Slot this Rune into a Wand or a Staff to gain the Armageddon Rune Attack. Call down a devastating inferno in front of you, engulfing the area in a massive explosion of fire.

name: Focus Halo
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Focus Halo Spell. Elevate your Focus, enhancing your Cerim abilities by increasing your maximum focus points for 120s.

name: Stamina Wellspring
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Stamina Wellspring Spell. Tap into a wellspring of energy, increasing your Stamina and enabling you to perform more actions for 120s.

name: Poise Shield
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Poise Shield Spell. Bolster your Poise, increasing your stability and resistance to being staggered by enemy attacks for 120s.

name: Pulse of Health
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Pulse of Health Spell. Restore your Health and increase your maximum health for 120s, ensuring you can withstand more damage in battle.

name: Damage Surge
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Damage Surge Spell. Temporarily boost your Attack, unleashing a surge of strength that increases your damage output for 120s.

name: Electric Enchantment
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Electric Enchantment Spell. Charge your weapon with electric power, electrifying each strike to shock and stun your adversaries.

name: Cold Enchantment
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Cold Enchantment Spell. Infuse your weapon with the essence of cold, chilling foes with frosty strikes that slow their advance.

name: Plague Enchantment
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Plague Enchantment Spell. Coat your weapon with a virulent plague, enhancing its strikes to rapidly build up plague damage.

name: Heat Enchantment
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Heat Enchantment Spell. Imbue your weapon with fiery energy, igniting your strikes to scorch enemies and set the battlefield ablaze.

name: Illuminate
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Illuminate Spell. Summon a radiant light that follows you, illuminating dark areas and revealing hidden paths.

name: Heal Aura
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Heal Aura Spell. Charge this spell to convert focus into health, surrounding yourself with a restorative aura that heals you over time.

name: Heal
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Heal Spell. Spend focus to restore your health, calling on inner power to recover from wounds.

name: Scream
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Scream Spell. Let out a powerful scream that knocks down enemies in front of you, leaving them vulnerable to follow-up attacks.

name: Thorns
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Thorns Spell. Channel sacred energy to get a mark of protection, reflecting damage back to enemies who strike you.

name: Repair
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Repair Spell. Channel sacred energy to repair and restore durability to your equipped items, ensuring they remain battle-ready.

name: Return
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Return Spell. Fast Travel to any unlocked whisper of your choice.

name: Channel
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Channel Spell. Charge this spell to draw in sacred energy, sacrificing health to gain focus and amplify your mystical power.

name: Blink
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Blink Spell. Harness mystical energy to teleport forward a short distance, even passing through enemies to evade or position strategically.

name: Heat Resistance
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Heat Resistance Spell. Gain resistance to heat-based attacks, reducing fire damage and improving your survival against fiery blows.

name: Electric Resistance
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Electric Resistance Spell. Enhance your defenses against lightning-based attacks, reducing lightning damage and preventing shock status.

name: Plague Resistance
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Plague Resistance Spell. Build up immunity to plague-based attacks, reducing toxin damage and mitigating poison effects.

name: Cold Resistance
description: Slot this Rune into a Utility Slot to gain the Cold Resistance Spell. Fortify yourself against cold-based attacks, reducing ice damage and increasing your resilience to freezing effects.

name: Turnback Kick
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Turnback Kick Technique. Spin around your axis and deliver a powerful backward kick that knocks enemies away.

name: Drone Trap
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Drone Trap Technique. Deploy a drone that homes in on your target and explodes on impact, leaving behind a trap. If enemies approach, the trap detonates with a second blast.

name: Dropkick
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Dropkick Technique. Launch yourself feet-first toward your enemy with a brutal dropkick, knocking them back with raw, physical force.

name: Regurgitate
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Regurgitate Technique. Vomit a stream of toxic bile at your enemy, dousing them in filth and corruption.

name: Throw Axe
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Throw Axe Technique. Hurl a spinning axe toward your enemy, dealing heavy damage on impact.

name: Frontflip Kick
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Frontflip Kick Technique. Perform a forward somersault and smash your foot down on the enemy, delivering a powerful, crushing blow.

name: Throw Knife
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Throw Knife Technique. Hurl a sharp knife at your enemy with deadly precision.

name: Swipe Kick
description: Slot this Rune into a Weapon to gain the Swipe Kick Technique. Spin into a powerful roundhouse kick, striking enemies with a wide, sweeping arc of force.

name: Double Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Double Spin Rune Attack. Execute a rapid spinning attack, striking enemies twice with each rotation.

name: Circular
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Circular Rune Attack. Execute a swift spin, striking enemies twice with a powerful circular attack that hits all around you.

name: Crush
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Crush Rune Attack. Swing your weapon overhead in a forceful spin and deliver a ground-shaking slam, dealing area of effect damage to all surrounding enemies.

name: Triple Swipe
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Triple Swipe Rune Attack. Overwhelm your foes by dealing three consecutive slashes.

name: Whirlstep Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Whirlstep Strike Rune Attack. Execute a tempestuous whirl, striking with two furious blows.

name: Whirl
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Whirl Rune Attack. Spin rapidly six times in a whirlwind attack, striking all nearby enemies with continuous blows.

name: Slashing Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Slashing Dash Rune Attack. Dash forward with a heavy slashing strike, cutting through enemies on your way.

name: Piercing Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Piercing Flurry Rune Attack. Unleash a flurry of piercing strikes, overwhelming enemies with relentless precision.

name: Evasive Swing
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Evasive Swing Rune Attack. Swing your weapon in an evasive arc, stepping to the left while dealing damage.

name: Trinity Barrage
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Trinity Barrage Rune Attack. Unleash a barrage of three consecutive strikes.

name: Fierce Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Fierce Dash Rune Attack. Throw yourself forward with ferocious speed, delivering a single stabbing blow that throws enemies back.

name: Charge Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Charge Strike Rune Attack. Charge forward with lethal momentum, culminating in a brutal strike that devastates any foe in your path.

name: Gyro Slash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Gyro Slash Rune Attack. Spin forward in a tight, high-speed rotation, turning your weapon into a whirling disc that slices through anything in your path.

name: Taunt Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Taunt Strike Rune Attack. Taunt enemies to draw their attention towards you and land a sudden blow.

name: Slashing Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Slashing Flurry Rune Attack. Unleash a flurry of slashing strikes, shredding enemies with a relentless assault and finishing with a piercing blow.

name: Leap
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Leap Rune Attack. Leap forward with agility and grace, closing the distance to your enemies and crushing them from above.

name: Piercing Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Piercing Dash Rune Attack. Dash forward with piercing momentum, striking enemies with a focused and forceful blow.

name: Jump Cut
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Jump Cut Rune Attack. Leap into the air and deliver a downward slashing strike to enemies below.

name: Overrun
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Overrun Rune Attack. Strike your enemy with a rapid two-hit combo, then lunge forward with your full body weight to stagger and overwhelm them.

name: Twirl Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Twirl Dash Rune Attack. Dash forward while twirling in a spiral motion, hitting enemies with spinning strikes.

name: Tornado Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Tornado Strike Rune Attack. Spin rapidly around your axis, striking enemies with each rotation in a relentless storm of blows.

name: Surge Slash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Surge Slash Rune Attack. Charge a powerful spinning strike, unleashing a surge of destructive force.

name: Slamdown
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Slamdown Rune Attack. Leap into the air and slam down with crushing force, chopping enemies in a radius upon impact.

name: Brutal Reprise
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Brutal Reprise Rune Attack. Swing your weapon in a brutal flourish, then unleash three heavy strikes in rapid succession to overpower your enemy.

name: Air Dodge
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Air Dodge Rune Attack. Execute an aerial roll to evade attacks, then immediately counter with a swift, forward stab.

name: Slashing Pirouette
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Slashing Pirouette Rune Attack. Perform a graceful double-strike pirouette forward.

name: Evasive Pierce
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Evasive Pierce Rune Attack. Swiftly strike your enemy and retreat.

name: Thrust
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Thrust Rune Attack. Thrust your weapon forward with a focused strike that knocks your enemy down.

name: Advancing Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Advancing Flurry Rune Attack. Advance while unleashing a rapid flurry of strikes, pushing back enemies with each hit.

name: Twirl Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Twirl Spin Rune Attack. Gracefully spin your weapon in a powerful whirlwind, smashing your enemies with dexterity, skill and a series of blows.

name: Crushing Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Crushing Flurry Rune Attack. Wield your weapon with relentless force, delivering seven consecutive crushing swings that batter any foe with each powerful hit.

name: Slashing Dodge
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Slashing Dodge Rune Attack. Take a step back to evade attacks and then lunge forward with a dissecting strike.

name: Throw
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Throw Rune Attack. Hurl your weapon with tremendous force, smashing through enemies in its path before returning to your hand.

name: Evasive Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Evasive Strike Rune Attack. Take a right step and execute a rapid strike.

name: Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Spin Rune Attack. Execute a wheel attack, sweeping all enemies on your way.

name: Piercing Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Piercing Spin Rune Attack. Unleash a piercing double-strike whirlwind.

name: Plague Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Plague Strike Rune Attack. Imbue your weapon with plague power, delivering an infectious strike that poisons foes.

name: Plague Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Plague Dash Rune Attack. Dash toward your foes with a weapon, covered in plague, to land a toxic strike that weakens and poisons.

name: Plague Throw
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Plague Throw Rune Attack. Imbue your weapon with plague and hurl it, smashing through enemies in its path and infecting them before returning to your hand.

name: Plague Swirl
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Plague Swirl Rune Attack. Unleash a swirling vortex of virulent energy, infecting nearby enemies with a debilitating plague.

name: Plague Whirl
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Plague Whirl Rune Attack. Spin in a prolonged toxic whirlwind, poisoning enemies to decay.

name: Stormpiercer
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Stormpiercer Rune Attack. Lunge forward to strike your enemy with a lightning-charged blow, then unleash projectiles from your weapon to electrify surrounding foes.

name: Lightning Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Dash Rune Attack. Dash toward your foes with a weapon, covered in lightning, to land a shocking strike that staggers.

name: Lightning Slam
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Slam Rune Attack. Leap into the air to evade attacks and bring pain to your opponents.

name: Lightning Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Flurry Rune Attack. Unleash a rapid flurry of lightning strikes, shocking and staggering foes with each electrifying blow.

name: Lightning Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Spin Rune Attack. Spin in a whirlwind of lightning, striking all nearby enemies with electrifying force.

name: Lightning Throw
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Throw Rune Attack. Imbue your weapon with lightning and hurl it, smashing through enemies in its path and electrifying them before returning to your hand.

name: Shock Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Shock Strike Rune Attack. Charge your weapon with crackling electricity and stun foes by delivering a shocking strike while jumping back from them.

name: Lightning Whirl
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Lightning Whirl Rune Attack. Spin in a prolonged electrical whirlwind, stunning and making enemies vulnerable.

name: Frost Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Frost Dash Rune Attack. Dash toward your foes with a weapon, cloaked in frost, to land a chilling strike that freezes them in place.

name: Ice Throw
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Ice Throw Rune Attack. Imbue your weapon with ice and hurl it, smashing through enemies in its path and freezing them before returning to your hand.

name: Frost Strike
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Frost Strike Rune Attack. Imbue your weapon with frost power, delivering a chilling strike that freezes foes in their tracks.

name: Ice Whirl
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Ice Whirl Rune Attack. Spin in a prolonged icy whirlwind, freezing and slowing down enemies.

name: Fire Dash
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Dash Rune Attack. Dash toward your foes with a weapon, engulfed in flames, to land a scorching strike that ignites on impact.

name: Blazing Rupture
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Blazing Rupture Rune Attack. Smash your weapon into the ground to create a fiery explosion, then spin in a searing arc to strike nearby enemies with burning force.

name: Fire Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Flurry Rune Attack. Unleash a rapid flurry of fiery strikes, engulfing foes in flames and leaving them scorched.

name: Fire Throw
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Throw Rune Attack. Imbue your weapon with fire and hurl it, smashing through enemies in its path and igniting them before returning to your hand.

name: Fire Whirl
description: Slot this Rune into a One-Handed Weapon to gain the Fire Whirl Rune Attack. Spin in a prolonged fiery whirlwind, engulfing enemies with flames and leaving them burned.

name: Bare Knuckle
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Bare Knuckle Rune Attack. Wind up and lunge forward with explosive force, delivering a powerful punch that knocks enemies clean off their feet.

name: Breakrush
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Breakrush Rune Attack. Unleash a barrage of quick strikes in rapid succession, pummeling your opponent with relentless blows.

name: Dragonfly Kick
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Dragonfly Kick Technique. Ascend in a spinning arc and dive down foot-first, striking with precision and flair.

name: Recoil Strike
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Recoil Strike Rune Attack. Dash back to avoid danger, then rebound with a lunging uppercut that launches enemies into the air.

name: Drive Break
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Drive Break Rune Attack. Charge forward and deliver a crushing punch with unstoppable force, staggering everything in your path.

name: Tempest Kick
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Tempest Kick Rune Attack. Launch into a spinning aerial assault, striking multiple times with a whirlwind of kicks.

name: Cyclone Kick
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Cyclone Kick Rune Attack. Leap into the air and spin in a wide arc, delivering a sweeping kick that hits all nearby enemies.

name: Tremor Wave
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Tremor Wave Rune Attack. Punch the ground with seismic force, unleashing a shockwave that travels forward and hits enemies from below.

name: Buster Rift
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Buster Rift Technique. Deliver a ground-tearing punch that launches a tremor wave forward, then slide back and fire a second explosive strike.

name: Skyfall Smash
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Skyfall Smash Rune Attack. Leap into the air and come crashing down with a devastating punch that creates a shockwave on impact.

name: Plague Retch
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Plague Retch Rune Attack. Evade backward in a smooth arc, then fire a plague-infused blast to punish your foe from range.

name: Spirit Burst
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Spirit Burst Rune Attack. Project a focused blast of inner energy from your fists, striking foes at range with pure force.

name: Rising Fang
description: Slot this Rune into Gauntlets to gain the Rising Fang Rune Attack. Launch into the air with a blazing uppercut, striking enemies with upward momentum and sending them flying.

name: Tornado Spin
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Tornado Spin Rune Attack. Spin in a deadly whirlwind that strikes all nearby enemies.

name: Double Take
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Double Take Rune Attack. Execute a lightning-fast double strike with your daggers, catching foes off guard with a swift and deadly assault.

name: Dashing Stab
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Dashing Stab Rune Attack. Stab your opponent with a powerful, piercing series of attacks.

name: Wild Rush
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Wild Rush Rune Attack. Charge forward, slashing wildly with your daggers to cut your way through foes.

name: Dual Breaker
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Dual Breaker Rune Attack. Strike with both daggers in a devastating cross slash, breaking through enemy defenses with sheer force.

name: Piercing Dodge
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Piercing Dodge Rune Attack. Dodge swiftly to evade incoming attacks, then pierce through your enemy with a precise, deadly strike from your daggers.

name: Dual Slash
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Dual Slash Rune Attack. Strike from above, deeply cleaving your opponent with your daggers.

name: Dual Flurry
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Dual Flurry Rune Attack. Unleash a barrage of daggers strikes, overwhelming your enemies with rapid, relentless piercing attacks.

name: Lightning Claw
description: Slot this Rune into a Double Dagger to gain the Lightning Claw Rune Attack. Electrify your daggers and dash forward, delivering two rapid claw strikes to shock your enemies.
